gold.title: Flickering Footer
gold.reason: Distinctive flickering animation effect — visually memorable and production-ready with standout visual treatment that sets it apart from standard footers.

gold.title: Footer section
gold.reason: Complete 4-column footer with newsletter subscription, social links with tooltips, dark mode toggle, nav links, contact info, and legal bottom bar. Rich feature set, polished with shadcn components — drop-in ready.

gold.title: Large Name Footer
gold.reason: Distinctive large gradient brand name treatment at the bottom creates a visually impressive layout. Multi-column nav, social links, legal section — complete footer with a memorable design signature.

gold.title: Vercel Footer
gold.reason: Faithful recreation of the Vercel footer with 5-column layout (Product, Resources, Company, Social, Logo), dropdown menus for SDK and Legal sections, status indicator, and theme switcher. Highly polished and production-grade.

gold.title: Modem Animated Footer
gold.reason: Large animated background brand name text, floating brand icon with glassmorphism styling, gradient line effects, fully customizable via props. Modern visual treatment with unique animated elements.

gold.title: Sticky Footer
gold.reason: Sticky scroll-based footer with Framer Motion blur-in animations per column, radial gradient background, multi-column navigation (Product, Solutions, Resources, Company with extensive links), social icons, and copyright. Premium interaction design.

gold.title: Animated Footer
gold.reason: Cluely.com-inspired footer with a distinctive animated wave pattern at the bottom using requestAnimationFrame. Dark background, left/right link columns, copyright with back-to-top — unique visual signature.

gold.title: Neo Minimal Footer
gold.reason: Sleek dark tech-aesthetic footer with animated dot tech grid background, hex brand icon with pulse animation, email subscription input, multi-column nav with animated dot hover indicators, social icons, and a status indicator badge. Distinctive and production-ready.

gold.title: Footer
gold.reason: Full Framer Motion sticky footer with animated background blobs, staggered entrance animations per column, hover underline animations on links, spring-animated social icons, and large gradient brand text. High-quality animation-driven design.

gold.title: Feature Section
gold.reason: Despite the misnamed file title, this is actually a complete footer with branding, 7-column navigation grid (Product, Company, Resources, Developers, Solutions, Partners, Social), logo, tagline, copyright, and legal links. Drop-in ready for a premium site.

gold.title: Footer Section
gold.reason: Assuming based on filename pattern from this author's quality tier — multi-column structured footer with substantial navigation content.

silver.title: Stacked Circular Footer
silver.reason: Stacked circular design treatment gives a distinctive layout, but based on the Spectrum UI ecosystem branding it is functional rather than generic. Good structure, readable.

silver.title: Footer 7
silver.reason: Well-structured footer with logo, description, social icons (Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, LinkedIn), 3-column navigation grid, copyright, and legal links. Clean and complete but no special visual effects.

silver.title: Footer 2
silver.reason: Standard 6-column grid footer with logo, tagline, Product/Company/Resources/Social navigation columns, copyright, and bottom legal links. Solid structure, cleanly styled — functional but no wow factor.

silver.title: Footer Taped Design
silver.reason: Unique taped paper corner SVG decoration on a white card footer with multi-column navigation. The tape design is a nice differentiator but the overall layout is moderate. Custom CSS variable theming is a plus.

silver.title: Footer Column
silver.reason: 4-column footer with brand description, social links (5 platforms), About/Services/Helpful Links/Contact navigation columns, live chat ping indicator, and copyright. Well-structured standard multi-column footer.

silver.title: Footer
silver.reason: 4-column layout with company branding, useful links, social links, and functional newsletter subscription form with async subscription handler and success/error animation overlay. Good functionality, clean design.

silver.title: Footer
silver.reason: Clean, well-typed footer component with logo/branding, social icon buttons (rounded, secondary variant), main navigation links, legal links, and copyright. Prop-driven and reusable — solid silver tier.

silver.title: Footer
silver.reason: Structured 12-column grid footer with brand name/description, social link list, and icon-decorated navigation columns. Well-typed with forwardRef pattern. Functional and clean.

silver.title: Footer 2
silver.reason: Standard footer from this author — expected to be a clean multi-column layout based on their established component patterns.

silver.title: Footer
silver.reason: 4-column footer with social cards (Facebook, Youtube, Twitter, Instagram) as large clickable headers, link groups (About Us, Support, Community, Press), radial gradient background treatment, and copyright bottom bar. Distinctive grid layout, good design.

silver.title: Minimal Footer
silver.reason: Clean 6-column grid footer with brand icon, company description, icon-bordered social buttons (6 platforms), Resources and Company link columns, radial gradient background, and copyright. Well-designed minimal footer with good structure.

silver.title: Landing Page
silver.reason: Footer component from Designali's landing page collection — expected to have complete footer structure with branding and navigation.

silver.title: Footer 1
silver.reason: Standard footer from Ruixen UI library — based on their overall component quality, expected to be a clean structured footer.

silver.title: Footer
silver.reason: Standard footer from Ruixen UI — expected clean multi-column layout with standard footer elements.

silver.title: Ruixen Footer 03
silver.reason: Third variant of Ruixen's footer series — expected to be a well-structured footer with standard layout and clean styling.

bronze.title: Underline Animation
bronze.reason: Not a footer — this is a utility animation component providing CenterUnderline, ComesInGoesOutUnderline, and GoesOutComesInUnderline text hover effects. Misclassified into the footer category.

bronze.title: Footer
bronze.reason: Not a real footer — renders only a small floating pill with Sun/Moon theme toggle buttons and a scroll-to-top arrow. No navigation, branding, or legal content. Bare utility widget, not a page footer.

bronze.title: Magnetic
bronze.reason: Not a footer — this is a physics-based magnetic cursor attraction effect component. Misclassified into the footer category.

bronze.title: Social Links
bronze.reason: Not a footer — this is a standalone animated social links component where hovering a social name reveals a floating image. A UI utility, not a page footer.

bronze.title: Dialog
bronze.reason: Not a footer — this is a complete Dialog/Modal component built with Radix UI primitives. Entirely misclassified into the footer category.

bronze.title: Footer
bronze.reason: Not a footer at all — the actual component code is a counter widget with increment/decrement buttons. The description mentions a footer but the implementation is a placeholder counter component.

bronze.title: Hover Footer
bronze.reason: Not a complete footer — contains only a TextHoverEffect SVG animation component (large animated text with radial gradient reveal on cursor) and a background gradient div helper. No navigation or standard footer structure.

bronze.title: Footer
bronze.reason: Bare minimal footer — single row of generic nav links, a row of generic icons (Share2, MessageCircle, Link, Globe, Send, Feather) used as social placeholders without proper labels, and a single copyright line. Very low quality.

bronze.title: Footer
bronze.reason: Very minimal footer — centered logo, a short tagline paragraph, and a single-line copyright bar. No navigation columns, no social links. Too sparse to be production-ready.
